Do you feel supported by AI community here? 

It’s been one of the best communities when I started posting four years ago. I wonder if you still feel it.

Big deal paper here: field experiment on 515 startups, half shown case studies of how startups are successfully using AI.

Those firms used AI 44% more, had 1.9x higher revenue, needed 39% less capital:
1) AI accelerates businesses
2) The challenge is understanding how to use it https://t.co/3verMMjO3e

RT @godofprompt: 🚨BREAKING: Claude can now refine your startup idea like Paul Graham evaluates YC startups (for free).

Most ideas sound go…

I tested 200+ workflows on Perplexity Computer.

The ones that failed all had the same problem: they were prompted like ChatGPT conversations.

The ones that delivered McKinsey-grade output? All used one framework.

It's called the Dispatch Brief. Full breakdown inside.

boss上有的老板的岗位要求写得也是挺烂的 ...

1. 招使用 springboot 的全栈工程师，还要回用 uniapp 做移动前端...

2. 招会爬虫技术和逆向API（黑客）技术的大模型预训练工程师，要求 从数据获取 、数据清洗 、 数据预训练 、 模型评估、 后训练，独立开发一个人搞定...

上面几个技能跨度可大了...
